note: Curated recurring highlights at real Toulouse venues. Dates are relative to today. Each item links to an official source.

events.title: Cité de l'Espace – Space Park
events.description: Full-scale Ariane rocket, planetarium and hands-on space exhibits.

events.title: Place du Capitole – Heart of the City
events.description: Pink-brick square, city hall and bustling cafés in the Pink City.

events.title: Basilique Saint-Sernin – Romanesque Gem
events.description: UNESCO-listed pilgrimage church and largest Romanesque building in Europe.

events.title: Canal du Midi – Waterside Bike Ride
events.description: UNESCO canal towpaths perfect for cycling and picnics.

events.title: Musée des Abattoirs – Modern Art
events.description: Contemporary and modern art in a converted slaughterhouse.

events.title: Théâtre du Capitole – Opera & Ballet
events.description: National opera house of the Occitanie region.

events.title: Jardin des Plantes – Botanical Stroll
events.description: Historic botanical garden and greenhouses near the university.

events.title: Saint-Cyprien Market – Sunday Morning
events.description: Lively neighbourhood market on the left bank of the Garonne.

events.title: Aeroscopia – Aviation Museum
events.description: Airbus heritage, Concorde and interactive aviation displays.
